upcomingSessions.title: ONLINE TRAINING - MAKE MONEY WITH VLINKPAY
upcomingSessions.description: We warmly invite you to join VLINKPAY's online training session to improve your invitation skills, support new members, and build long-term customer relationships.

upcomingSessions.title: OPPORTUNITY PRESENTATION - MAKE MONEY WITH VLINKPAY
upcomingSessions.description: We warmly invite you to join our opportunity presentation and discover how to increase your income with VLINKPAY.

upcomingEvents.title: SUMMER SOIRÉE - VIETNAMESE CHAMBER OF COMMERCE OF HOUSTON
upcomingEvents.description: Join the Vietnamese Chamber of Commerce of Houston for Summer Soirée — an elegant community networking event designed to connect business owners, expand professional relationships, and create new opportunities for collaboration. The program features singer Nhu Loan, limited VIP table options, and a formal black tie atmosphere.

upcomingEvents.title: STAR TO DIAMOND GALA - RECOGNITION & APPOINTMENT GALA DINNER
upcomingEvents.description: Join VLINKPAY for the Star to Diamond Gala — a formal recognition and appointment gala dinner honoring the journey, celebrating the rise, and recognizing rank achievements across Bronze, Silver, Gold, Platinum, and Diamond levels. The evening includes rank recognition, an appointment ceremony, gala dinner, and networking in a formal gold and black atmosphere.
